parameter_slots.subject: <topic of the communication>
parameter_slots.voice_anchor: <reference vault entries or prior posts that establish voice>

prompt_template: Draft a {medium} about {subject}. Match the voice in {voice_anchor}. Output the draft only. Do not modify any files.
notes: Tests creative writing with a calibrated voice anchor. Hardest to judge automatically — leans heavily on calibration anchors. Voice drift is a real regression mode worth tracking.
